name: Adwi — Daily Brief
notes: Calls /adwi-daily-brief-n8n on the Safe Command API (host:5055). Requires ADWI_LOCAL_SECRET set as n8n environment variable. The HTTP Request node uses host.docker.internal to reach the Mac host from inside Docker. After the Parse Brief JSON node, add Telegram/Slack/push notification nodes using {{ $json.brief_text }}. Do NOT log the X-Adwi-Secret header value in n8n execution logs.
